title: poa sphondylodes var. alpina
intro: Poa sphondylodes var. alpina, also known as Alpin bluestem, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant has been valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Alpin bluestem is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
